title: RateLimit
description: Hatchet RateLimit entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

key.description: The key for the rate limit.

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant associated with this rate limit.

limitValue.description: The maximum number of requests allowed within the window.

value.description: The current number of requests made within the window.

window.description: The window of time in which the limitValue is enforced.

lastRefill.description: The last time the rate limit was refilled.
